hooks.prompt: A git push just ran. Use Bash to get the current branch: `git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD`. Then use mcp__github__list_pull_requests (owner: rcktgrl, repo: nele.pet, state: open, head: <branch>) to check whether an open PR already exists for that branch. If one exists, do nothing. If none exists, use mcp__github__create_pull_request to open a PR from that branch into main for owner rcktgrl, repo nele.pet. Use the output of `git log origin/main..HEAD --oneline` to write a concise title and a brief bullet-point body summarising the commits.
